hero.title: Our Vision
hero.subtitle: Since 2013, we have been building bridges between people and their goals through excellent services and a unique human approach.

story.title: Over 10 Years of Dedication
story.p1: Javed Group was born in Gallarate with the goal of becoming a reference point for the local and international community.
story.p2: Our strength lies in multidisciplinarity: a single core that coordinates travel, mobility, tax and insurance consultancy with the same obsessive attention to detail.

ecosystem.title: Our Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Four excellences united under a single vision of service and professionalism.
